name: Jacksonville
author: rslurry
description:
Uses 2023 LODES data. Coverage spans St. Augustine in the south, Fernandina Beach in the north, and Baldwin in the west.
Includes demand for JAX airport; FSCJ, UNF, SJR State, JU, Flagler, and EWU universities; the Jacksonville Public Library, EverBank Stadium, James Weldon Johnson Park, Vystar Arena, the Cummer Museum of Art, and the Jacksonville Zoo and Botanical Gardens.
